title: dalbergia tilarana
intro: Dalbergia tilarana, also known as Guayacan, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and is a member of the legume family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dalbergia tilarana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, as well as its ability to help manage conditions such as diarrhea and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Dalbergia tilarana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
